verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia tempus habent,  et suis spatiis transeunt universa sub cælo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַכֹּ֖ל זְמָ֑ן וְעֵ֥ת לְכׇל־חֵ֖פֶץ תַּ֥חַת הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: To every thing there is a season, and a time to every purpose under the heaven:

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus nascendi, et tempus moriendi ;  tempus plantandi, et tempus evellendi quod plantatum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֥ת לָלֶ֖דֶת וְעֵ֣ת לָמ֑וּת עֵ֣ת לָטַ֔עַת וְעֵ֖ת לַעֲק֥וֹר נָטֽוּעַ׃
verses.king_james: A time to be born, and a time to die; a time to plant, and a time to pluck up that which is planted;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus occidendi, et tempus sanandi ;  tempus destruendi, et tempus ædificandi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֤ת לַהֲרוֹג֙ וְעֵ֣ת לִרְפּ֔וֹא עֵ֥ת לִפְר֖וֹץ וְעֵ֥ת לִבְנֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: A time to kill, and a time to heal; a time to break down, and a time to build up;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus flendi, et tempus ridendi ;  tempus plangendi, et tempus saltandi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֤ת לִבְכּוֹת֙ וְעֵ֣ת לִשְׂח֔וֹק עֵ֥ת סְפ֖וֹד וְעֵ֥ת רְקֽוֹד׃
verses.king_james: A time to weep, and a time to laugh; a time to mourn, and a time to dance;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus spargendi lapides, et tempus colligendi,  tempus amplexandi, et tempus longe fieri ab amplexibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֚ת לְהַשְׁלִ֣יךְ אֲבָנִ֔ים וְעֵ֖ת כְּנ֣וֹס אֲבָנִ֑ים עֵ֣ת לַחֲב֔וֹק וְעֵ֖ת לִרְחֹ֥ק מֵחַבֵּֽק׃
verses.king_james: A time to cast away stones, and a time to gather stones together; a time to embrace, and a time to refrain from embracing;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus acquirendi, et tempus perdendi ;  tempus custodiendi, et tempus abjiciendi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֤ת לְבַקֵּשׁ֙ וְעֵ֣ת לְאַבֵּ֔ד עֵ֥ת לִשְׁמ֖וֹר וְעֵ֥ת לְהַשְׁלִֽיךְ׃
verses.king_james: A time to get, and a time to lose; a time to keep, and a time to cast away;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus scindendi, et tempus consuendi ;  tempus tacendi, et tempus loquendi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֤ת לִקְר֙וֹעַ֙ וְעֵ֣ת לִתְפּ֔וֹר עֵ֥ת לַחֲשׁ֖וֹת וְעֵ֥ת לְדַבֵּֽר׃
verses.king_james: A time to rend, and a time to sew; a time to keep silence, and a time to speak;

verses.latin_vulgate: Tempus dilectionis, et tempus odii ;  tempus belli, et tempus pacis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵ֤ת לֶֽאֱהֹב֙ וְעֵ֣ת לִשְׂנֹ֔א עֵ֥ת מִלְחָמָ֖ה וְעֵ֥ת שָׁלֽוֹם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: A time to love, and a time to hate; a time of war, and a time of peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid habet amplius homo de labore suo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־יִּתְרוֹן֙ הָֽעוֹשֶׂ֔ה בַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר ה֥וּא עָמֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: What profit hath he that worketh in that wherein he laboureth?

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi afflictionem quam dedit Deus filiis hominum,  ut distendantur in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָאִ֣יתִי אֶת־הָֽעִנְיָ֗ן אֲשֶׁ֨ר נָתַ֧ן אֱלֹהִ֛ים לִבְנֵ֥י הָאָדָ֖ם לַעֲנ֥וֹת בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: I have seen the travail, which God hath given to the sons of men to be exercised in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cuncta fecit bona in tempore suo,  et mundum tradidit disputationi eorum,  ut non inveniat homo opus  quod operatus est Deus ab initio usque ad finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַכֹּ֥ל עָשָׂ֖ה יָפֶ֣ה בְעִתּ֑וֹ גַּ֤ם אֶת־הָעֹלָם֙ נָתַ֣ן בְּלִבָּ֔ם מִבְּלִ֞י אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־יִמְצָ֣א הָאָדָ֗ם אֶת־הַֽמַּעֲשֶׂ֛ה אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֥ה הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים מֵרֹ֥אשׁ וְעַד־סֽוֹף׃
verses.king_james: He hath made every thing beautiful in his time: also he hath set the world in their heart, so that no man can find out the work that God maketh from the beginning to the end.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cognovi quod non esset melius nisi lætari,  et facere bene in vita sua ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָדַ֕עְתִּי כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין ט֖וֹב בָּ֑ם כִּ֣י אִם־לִשְׂמ֔וֹחַ וְלַעֲשׂ֥וֹת ט֖וֹב בְּחַיָּֽיו׃
verses.king_james: I know that there is no good in them, but for a man to rejoice, and to do good in his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnis enim homo qui comedit et bibit,  et videt bonum de labore suo,  hoc donum Dei est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֤ם כׇּל־הָאָדָם֙ שֶׁיֹּאכַ֣ל וְשָׁתָ֔ה וְרָאָ֥ה ט֖וֹב בְּכׇל־עֲמָל֑וֹ מַתַּ֥ת אֱלֹהִ֖ים הִֽיא׃
verses.king_james: And also that every man should eat and drink, and enjoy the good of all his labour, it is the gift of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Didici quod omnia opera quæ fecit Deus perseverent in perpetuum ;  non possumus eis quidquam addere, nec auferre,  quæ fecit Deus ut timeatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָדַ֗עְתִּי כִּ֠י כׇּל־אֲשֶׁ֨ר יַעֲשֶׂ֤ה הָאֱלֹהִים֙ ה֚וּא יִהְיֶ֣ה לְעוֹלָ֔ם עָלָיו֙ אֵ֣ין לְהוֹסִ֔יף וּמִמֶּ֖נּוּ אֵ֣ין לִגְרֹ֑עַ וְהָאֱלֹהִ֣ים עָשָׂ֔ה שֶׁיִּֽרְא֖וּ מִלְּפָנָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: I know that, whatsoever God doeth, it shall be for ever: nothing can be put to it, nor any thing taken from it: and God doeth it, that men should fear before him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod factum est, ipsum permanet ;  quæ futura sunt jam fuerunt,  et Deus instaurat quod abiit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־שֶּֽׁהָיָה֙ כְּבָ֣ר ה֔וּא וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר לִהְי֖וֹת כְּבָ֣ר הָיָ֑ה וְהָאֱלֹהִ֖ים יְבַקֵּ֥שׁ אֶת־נִרְדָּֽף׃
verses.king_james: That which hath been is now; and that which is to be hath already been; and God requireth that which is past.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi sub sole in loco judicii impietatem,  et in loco justitiæ iniquitatem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְע֥וֹד רָאִ֖יתִי תַּ֣חַת הַשָּׁ֑מֶשׁ מְק֤וֹם הַמִּשְׁפָּט֙ שָׁ֣מָּה הָרֶ֔שַׁע וּמְק֥וֹם הַצֶּ֖דֶק שָׁ֥מָּה הָרָֽשַׁע׃
verses.king_james: And moreover I saw under the sun the place of judgment, that wickedness was there; and the place of righteousness, that iniquity was there.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dixi in corde meo :  Justum et impium judicabit Deus,  et tempus omnis rei tunc erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֤רְתִּֽי אֲנִי֙ בְּלִבִּ֔י אֶת־הַצַּדִּיק֙ וְאֶת־הָ֣רָשָׁ֔ע יִשְׁפֹּ֖ט הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים כִּי־עֵ֣ת לְכׇל־חֵ֔פֶץ וְעַ֥ל כׇּל־הַֽמַּעֲשֶׂ֖ה שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: I said in mine heart, God shall judge the righteous and the wicked: for there is a time there for every purpose and for every work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixi in corde meo de filiis hominum,  ut probaret eos Deus,  et ostenderet similes esse bestiis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמַ֤רְתִּֽי אֲנִי֙ בְּלִבִּ֔י עַל־דִּבְרַת֙ בְּנֵ֣י הָאָדָ֔ם לְבָרָ֖ם הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וְלִרְא֕וֹת שְׁהֶם־בְּהֵמָ֥ה הֵ֖מָּה לָהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: I said in mine heart concerning the estate of the sons of men, that God might manifest them, and that they might see that they themselves are beasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco unus interitus est hominis et jumentorum,  et æqua utriusque conditio.  Sicut moritur homo,  sic et illa moriuntur.  Similiter spirant omnia,  et nihil habet homo jumento amplius :  cuncta subjacent vanitati,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ מִקְרֶ֨ה בְֽנֵי־הָאָדָ֜ם וּמִקְרֶ֣ה הַבְּהֵמָ֗ה וּמִקְרֶ֤ה אֶחָד֙ לָהֶ֔ם כְּמ֥וֹת זֶה֙ כֵּ֣ן מ֣וֹת זֶ֔ה וְר֥וּחַ אֶחָ֖ד לַכֹּ֑ל וּמוֹתַ֨ר הָאָדָ֤ם מִן־הַבְּהֵמָה֙ אָ֔יִן כִּ֥י הַכֹּ֖ל הָֽבֶל׃
verses.king_james: For that which befalleth the sons of men befalleth beasts; even one thing befalleth them: as the one dieth, so dieth the other; yea, they have all one breath; so that a man hath no preeminence above a beast: for all is vanity.

verses.latin_vulgate: et omnia pergunt ad unum locum.  De terra facta sunt,  et in terram pariter revertuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַכֹּ֥ל הוֹלֵ֖ךְ אֶל־מָק֣וֹם אֶחָ֑ד הַכֹּל֙ הָיָ֣ה מִן־הֶֽעָפָ֔ר וְהַכֹּ֖ל שָׁ֥ב אֶל־הֶעָפָֽר׃
verses.king_james: All go unto one place; all are of the dust, and all turn to dust again.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis novit si spiritus filiorum Adam ascendat sursum,  et si spiritus jumentorum descendat deorsum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֣י יוֹדֵ֗עַ ר֚וּחַ בְּנֵ֣י הָאָדָ֔ם הָעֹלָ֥ה הִ֖יא לְמָ֑עְלָה וְר֙וּחַ֙ הַבְּהֵמָ֔ה הַיֹּרֶ֥דֶת הִ֖יא לְמַ֥טָּה לָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Who knoweth the spirit of man that goeth upward, and the spirit of the beast that goeth downward to the earth?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et deprehendi nihil esse melius  quam lætari hominem in opere suo,  et hanc esse partem illius.  Quis enim eum adducet ut post se futura cognoscat ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאִ֗יתִי כִּ֣י אֵ֥ין טוֹב֙ מֵאֲשֶׁ֨ר יִשְׂמַ֤ח הָאָדָם֙ בְּֽמַעֲשָׂ֔יו כִּי־ה֖וּא חֶלְק֑וֹ כִּ֣י מִ֤י יְבִיאֶ֙נּוּ֙ לִרְא֔וֹת בְּמֶ֖ה שֶׁיִּהְיֶ֥ה אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore I perceive that there is nothing better, than that a man should rejoice in his own works; for that is his portion: for who shall bring him to see what shall be after him?
